text: Being here, I feel both curious and contemplative. The first scene shows people gathered behind glass, absorbed in discussion or learning—an environment of exchange that stokes my intellectual appetite but also invokes a sense of separation. The second scene immerses me in an expanse of ideas: research, development, the invitation to reflect. The poetic words on the wall stir an introspective mood within me, making me aware of lingering uncertainties and of my own openness to wonder. Together, these moments evoke in me a sense of possibility, mixed with quiet introspection.
